attributes.description: Jump Lists — Insider Threat. Covers both .automaticDestinations-ms (Windows-managed per-AppID recent files with DestList MRU + Pinned state) and .customDestinations-ms (app-managed categories like Outlook Recent / Chrome Most-visited / PuTTY Pinned sessions). Top: App Usage donut showing which apps are actually in use. Below: ALL ACTIVITY hero, then 2x2 grid of insider-threat-flavored views (Removable Media, Network/UNC, Pinned, Cross-machine tracker) plus a Sensitive File Types panel.
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p1","w":48,"x":0,"y":0},"panelIndex":"jl-p1","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p1","title":"App Usage Distribution — which apps actually have jump-list activity on this host","type":"lens"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":14,"i":"jl-p2","w":48,"x":0,"y":12},"panelIndex":"jl-p2","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p2","title":"ALL ACTIVITY — every jump-list entry, both AutoDest + CustomDest, by @timestamp desc","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p3","w":24,"x":0,"y":26},"panelIndex":"jl-p3","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p3","title":"REMOVABLE MEDIA — files opened from USB / external HDD / optical (drive-letter heuristic + DriveType=Removable)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p4","w":24,"x":24,"y":26},"panelIndex":"jl-p4","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p4","title":"NETWORK SHARES + mapped drives — UNC paths and W:-Z: drive letters","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p5","w":24,"x":0,"y":38},"panelIndex":"jl-p5","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p5","title":"PINNED ITEMS — explicitly pinned by the user (strong intent signal)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p6","w":24,"x":24,"y":38},"panelIndex":"jl-p6","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p6","title":"CROSS-MACHINE TRACKER — file originated on a different machine (LNK MachineID != Hostname)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"jl-p7","w":48,"x":0,"y":50},"panelIndex":"jl-p7","panelRefName":"panel_jl-p7","title":"SENSITIVE FILE TYPES — SSH/PGP keys, certificates, archives, scripts","type":"search"}]
attributes.title: Jump Lists
